meaning: n.[天] 人马(星)座,(纹章学中的)弓射手(或半人半马怪物)图形
examples: Write down your ideas, dear Sagittarius, or write them as a screenplay.
It came from the direction of Sagittarius; the nearest star in that direction is 220 light-years away.
It is obscured by vast clouds of gas and dust in the constellation of Sagittarius.
He notes it could be part of the Sagittarius stream, a remnant of the Sagittarius dwarf galaxy, long assumed to be one of the building blocks of our own Milky Way.
